name: Morning Glass Coffee
tagline: Manoa's beloved neighborhood cafe where UH professors and surfers share the same lanai.
mustOrder: honey lavender latte — floral and smooth
acai bowl — thick, not watered down
parking: Small lot behind the building; street parking on East Manoa Rd
talkStory: A Manoa institution since 2012, opened by a husband-and-wife team who wanted to create the neighborhood’s living room. The upstairs lanai is magical on a rainy Manoa morning — and it rains a lot up here, which is part of the charm. UH professors, grad students, and Manoa families all share the same tables. The honey lavender latte is the signature, and the breakfast menu is legitimately good. Stop here before Manoa Falls — way better than anything near the trailhead.
